## Type of Change

## Testing

> [!IMPORTANT]
> PRs without tests will not be merged. Please ensure your changes are properly tested.

- [ ] I have added new tests for my changes
- [ ] I have updated existing tests as needed
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Prek hooks pass (`uv run prek run --all-files`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's [style guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] No unnecessary files or changes included
- [ ] PR title is concise and descriptive
